title: The Burnt Church
creator: Pon Pon Chapel of Ease
description: Built in 1725 as the first Anglican church in the stateand burned in 1801  rebuilt in 1822 and burned again 1832 on Parker's Ferry Road. A main throughfare from Charleston to Savannah
subject: This church was built in 1727 and John Wesley (founder of the Methodist church) preached here twice in 1737. George Washington is rumored to have visited on his way to visit  his family on his Spring tour  in 1791
rights: materials produced by Shaneda Destine
